SEARCH
Package com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.manager

Class JobRewardService

java.lang.Object
com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.manager.JobRewardService
public final class JobRewardService extends Object
Converts normalized job actions into xp, levels, and money payouts.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    JobRewardService(Core core, JobsRepository repo, JobDefinitionRegistry registry, EconomyRepository economy, LedgerRepository ledger, JobPayoutNotifier notifier)
    Creates the job reward processor and its economy dependencies.

    Method
    Description
    void
    handleAction(JobActionContext action)
    Processes a normalized job action for all jobs currently assigned to the player.

  • Constructor Details

    • JobRewardService

      public JobRewardService(Core core, JobsRepository repo, JobDefinitionRegistry registry, EconomyRepository economy, LedgerRepository ledger, JobPayoutNotifier notifier)
      Creates the job reward processor and its economy dependencies.
      Parameters:
      core - plugin instance
      repo - jobs persistence layer
      registry - loaded job definitions
      economy - economy account repository
      ledger - economy ledger repository
      notifier - payout notification service

  • Method Details

    • handleAction

      public void handleAction(JobActionContext action)
      Processes a normalized job action for all jobs currently assigned to the player.
      Parameters:
      action - normalized player action
